record.field: Home Assistant is the leading open-source home automation platform that puts local control and privacy first.

Home Assistant is the leading open-source home automation platform that puts local control and privacy first.

It unifies thousands of smart-home devices and services behind a single self-hosted hub, letting you create automations that run instantly on your own hardware rather than in someone else's cloud. Built in Python with a vast integration ecosystem, it serves both non-technical users through a no-code automation editor and power users through scripting, templating and a rich add-on system.

Key features
  • Local-first control of 2000+ integrations across lighting, climate, sensors, cameras and media
  • Visual no-code automation editor plus advanced scripting, scenes and templating
  • Customizable dashboards (Lovelace) for web and mobile companion apps
  • Optional add-on ecosystem via the Supervisor, with secure ingress and token-based auth
  • Local voice and AI assist (Whisper STT, Piper TTS, Ollama LLMs) with no cloud dependency
  • Energy management, history, logbook and Zigbee/Z-Wave/Matter/Thread support
Best for

Homeowners, makers and privacy-conscious users who want to consolidate smart-home devices into one self-hosted hub and keep automation data on-premises, as well as integrators building reliable, vendor-neutral home or small-office automation.

field.name: tag_ids
field.eval: [Command.set([ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_self_hosted'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_automation'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_privacy'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_no_code'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_workflow'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_dev_tools'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_smart_home')])]

record.field: services: homeassistant: image: ghcr.io/home-assistant/home-assistant:stable restart: unless-stopped ports: - '{{ PORT_HTTP }}:8123' volumes: - ../files/configuration.yaml:/config/configuration.yaml - ../files/automations.yaml:/config/automations.yaml - ../files/scripts.yaml:/config/scripts.yaml - ../files/scenes.yaml:/config/scenes.yaml - /opt/homeassistant:/config - /etc/localtime:/etc/localtime:ro - /run/dbus:/run/dbus:ro healthcheck: test: - CMD - curl - -f - http://homeassistant:8123/ interval: 60s retries: 5 start_period: 300s timeout: 2s container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}' networks: - internal - agz-proxy-network networks: internal: driver: bridge agz-proxy-network: external: true

# Loads default set of integrations. Do not remove. default_config:
# Load frontend themes from the themes folder frontend: themes: !include_dir_merge_named themes
automation: !include automations.yaml script: !include scripts.yaml scene: !include scenes.yaml
http: use_x_forwarded_for: true trusted_proxies: - 192.168.0.0/16 # Local LAN Subnet - 172.0.0.0/8 # Docker Subnet - 10.0.0.0/16 # Docker Swarm Subnet
